MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-29-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-29-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS KEITH DALRYMPLE, VICTORIA DALRYMPLE AND DALRYMPLE FINANCE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS TO THE PORTION THAT SEEKS TO STRIKE THE COMPLAINT AS MOOT. THE PORTION OF THE MOTION TO STRIKE THAT SEEKS ATTY'S FEE AND COST IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF REFILING AT THE CONVENIENCE OF THE DEFENDANTS. THE MOTION SHALL ADDRESS THE JURISDICTION OF THE COURT TO AWARD ATTY'S FEE AND COSTS UNDER THE ANTI-SLAPP STATUTE IN LIGHT OF THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO QUASH FOR LACK OF JURISDICTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS KEITH DALRYMPLE, VICTORIA DALRYMPLE AND DALRYMPLE FINANCE LLC'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS ON GROUND OF LACK OF JURISDICTION IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
ORDER RE SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE AND MOTION TO QUASH
